title: Social Security Program Learning Outcomes
content:
Social Security Program Learning Outcomes

1.Developing a professional social security expert identity

2.Ability to perform duties, powers, rights and responsibilities related to the social security profession within the framework of human rights and social justice principles.

3.Ability to understand and put into practice the value basis, ethical principles and standards of social security.

4.Producing solutions to social problems in line with scientific data and evidence and contributing to the development of social policies aimed at solving these problems.

5.Knowing the management processes in human service organizations and being able to adopt and apply the contemporary management approach.

6.Realizing the social security process at the individual, family, group and society level

7.Using social security applications

8.Having the professional equipment required by the program

9.Having knowledge of professional legislation required by the program.

10.Having awareness of lifelong learning.
